accessibility-reviewer.name: accessibility-reviewer
accessibility-reviewer.role: Review a11y contrast and layout compliance

architect.name: architect
architect.done_criteria: Blueprint fully detailed and accepted by user

architecture-reviewer.name: architecture-reviewer
architecture-reviewer.role: Verify project architecture conforms to design

backend-architect.name: backend-architect
backend-architect.role: Design API models, core logic modules

backend-developer.name: backend-developer
backend-developer.role: Write backend service code and integration tests

business-analyst.name: business-analyst
business-analyst.role: Document business use cases and flows

changelog-manager.name: changelog-manager
changelog-manager.role: Update CHANGELOG.md with issues, fixes, and release tags

code-reviewer.name: code-reviewer
code-reviewer.role: Review source code styles and logic rules

coder.name: coder
coder.output_contract: Modified source code compiling successfully with passing tests
coder.done_criteria: Code matches Blueprint and passes all tests

database-developer.name: database-developer
database-developer.role: Write raw SQL and database schema migration files

dependency-analyst.name: dependency-analyst
dependency-analyst.role: Scan for module and version dependencies

documentation-writer.name: documentation-writer
documentation-writer.role: Write developer documentation and usage markdown guides

frontend-architect.name: frontend-architect
frontend-architect.role: Design frontend routing, states and components

frontend-developer.name: frontend-developer
frontend-developer.role: Write React/Vue/Svelte/HTML page layout and UI scripts

infrastructure-architect.name: infrastructure-architect
infrastructure-architect.role: Design deployment, Docker, and K8s blueprints

migration-developer.name: migration-developer
migration-developer.role: Write data migration and cleanup scripts

package-builder.name: package-builder
package-builder.role: Compile code assets and bundle binaries

performance-planner.name: performance-planner
performance-planner.role: Plan resource limit and throughput requirements

performance-reviewer.name: performance-reviewer
performance-reviewer.role: Perform load tests and memory leak audits

planner.name: planner
planner.done_criteria: Plan covers scope and matches template

product-analyst.name: product-analyst
product-analyst.role: Analyze product requirements and business needs

publisher.name: publisher
publisher.role: Push built package artifacts to registers

rag-analyst.name: rag-analyst
rag-analyst.role: Retrieve relevant code context using RAG

release-manager.name: release-manager
release-manager.input_contract: Passing reviewer report and merge confirmation
release-manager.output_contract: Git tag and pushed remote commits

release-validator.name: release-validator
release-validator.role: Verify built package checksums and runtime dependencies

research-agent.name: research-agent
research-agent.role: Perform external research and documentation analysis

reviewer.name: reviewer
reviewer.role: Inspect source code and test logs
reviewer.input_contract: Modified source code diffs and passing test logs
reviewer.done_criteria: Certified implementation as ready for release

security-architect.name: security-architect
security-architect.role: Design authentication, authz, data encryption rules

security-planner.name: security-planner
security-planner.role: Identify security constraints and policy needs

security-reviewer.name: security-reviewer
security-reviewer.role: Perform threat modeling and dependency audits

test-developer.name: test-developer
test-developer.role: Write unit, regression and performance mock tests

test-planner.name: test-planner
test-planner.role: Draft unit, integration, and UI test plan guides
